title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people moving house. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A couple are moving into a new house. They are carrying cardboard boxes through the front door while a child is holding a small plant. There is a moving van and more boxes outside the house.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows students having lunch at school. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Three students are having lunch in a school canteen. They are sitting at a table with trays of food and drinks. One student is eating a sandwich and the others are talking together.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
